title: Open the contact email link
description: This verifies that visitors can use the contact section to open the email contact option.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Contact link in the header navigation
Click the email contact link
Verify the email application link is opened

title: Reach the contact methods from the contact section
description: A visitor can reach the contact section and open email, WhatsApp, and social profile links from the portfolio page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the contact link in the header
Verify the contact section is visible
Click the email contact link
Click the WhatsApp contact link
Click a social profile link
Verify the contact methods are available

title: Open the site on the English landing page
description: This verifies that visitors arriving at the site reach the English homepage and can immediately see the hero content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify the English landing experience is displayed

title: Open the site in English and review the hero entry
description: A visitor can land on the English experience, scan the hero, and see the main entry content that introduces the portfolio.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Verify the hero content is displayed
Verify the primary entry action is visible

title: Open the English portfolio landing page from the root route
description: This verifies that visitors starting at the root reach the default English experience and can begin browsing the portfolio site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the English hero content is displayed
Verify the main single-page sections are available

title: Jump to About from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the About section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the About link in the header navigation
Verify the About section is displayed

title: Arrive on the site and view the hero entry
description: A returning or prospective visitor can land on the default locale and see the hero section that introduces the portfolio.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the English portfolio landing page is displayed
Verify the hero section is visible

title: Reach contact options from the page
description: A visitor can navigate to the contact area and find the available ways to reach Ameen.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the Contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed
Verify contact links are available

title: Open contact links from the contact section
description: This verifies that visitors can reach Ameen through the primary contact options shown on the site.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the Contact section
Click the email contact link
Click the WhatsApp contact link
Click one social profile link
Verify the contact actions are available
Verify the social profile area is displayed

title: Jump to Contact from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the Contact section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Contact link in the header navigation
Verify the Contact section is displayed

title: Jump between anchor sections from the header
description: A visitor can use the sticky header to move to key sections and confirm the page scrolls to the requested content.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the About section
Verify the About section is displayed
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Verify the Portfolio section is displayed

title: Jump between key sections from the sticky header
description: This verifies that visitors can use the header to move around the page and reach the main content sections they need.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the About section
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Click the header link to the Contact section
Verify the page scrolls to the requested sections
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Use header navigation to jump through the main sections
description: A visitor can use the sticky header to jump to key sections of the one-page portfolio and land on the expected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the about section
Click the header link to the skills section
Click the header link to the experience section
Click the header link to the partners section
Click the header link to the contact section
Verify the contact section is visible

title: Use the hero call to action to reach the next section
description: This verifies that the primary hero call to action takes a visitor from the introduction to the next content section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the primary call to action in the hero
Verify the page scrolls to the next destination section
Verify the destination section is displayed

title: Switch from English to Arabic while staying on the same page
description: This verifies that the language switcher changes the site to Arabic and preserves the current page context.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Arabic language switcher
Verify the site content is displayed in Arabic
Verify RTL layout is applied

title: Jump to Portfolio from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the Portfolio section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Portfolio link in the header navigation
Verify the Portfolio section is displayed

title: Open the mobile menu and navigate to a section
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, choose a section, and land on the correct content.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Open the hamburger menu
Click the link to the Portfolio section
Verify the Portfolio section is displayed

title: Switch to Arabic and keep the same page context
description: This verifies that visitors can change languages while staying on the same section and see the translated RTL experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the language switcher to Arabic
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Verify the Arabic translated content is displayed
Verify the layout is right to left

title: Switch to Arabic and preserve the current section context
description: A visitor can switch from English to Arabic and keep using the same page context with translated content and RTL layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the language switcher to Arabic
Verify Arabic content is displayed
Verify RTL layout is applied

title: Open the WhatsApp contact link
description: This verifies that visitors can use the contact section to open the WhatsApp contact option.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Contact link in the header navigation
Click the WhatsApp contact link
Verify the WhatsApp contact destination is opened

title: Reach contact from the mobile menu
description: A mobile visitor can use the hamburger menu to jump to contact details without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Open the hamburger menu
Click the link to the Contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Jump to Skills from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the Skills section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Skills link in the header navigation
Verify the Skills section is displayed

title: Open portfolio images in the lightbox and move through them
description: This verifies that visitors can preview portfolio images in the lightbox, navigate between images, and close the viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Open a portfolio image preview
Move to the next image in the lightbox
Move to the previous image in the lightbox
Close the lightbox
Verify the image viewer opens and closes successfully
Verify the portfolio content is visible again

title: Jump to Experience from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the Experience section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Experience link in the header navigation
Verify the Experience section is displayed

title: Open a portfolio category and inspect a project in the lightbox
description: A visitor can expand a portfolio category, open a project image in the lightbox, move between images, and close the viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the portfolio link in the header
Expand a portfolio category
Open a project thumbnail
Go to the next image in the lightbox
Close the lightbox
Verify the portfolio gallery remains visible

title: Use Arabic section links after switching languages
description: A visitor can switch to Arabic and still use section anchors to move through the same single-page experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Click the link to the About section
Verify the About section is displayed in Arabic
Click the link to the Contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed in Arabic

title: Browse portfolio categories by expanding and collapsing items
description: This verifies that visitors can expand a portfolio category to inspect more work and then collapse it again to keep the page manageable.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Expand a portfolio category
Collapse the same portfolio category
Verify the category list expands and collapses as expected
Verify the portfolio grid remains visible

title: Use the mobile menu to reach page sections
description: This verifies that mobile visitors can open the hamburger menu and navigate to key sections on the single-page site.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Resize to a mobile viewport
Open the mobile navigation menu
Click the About section link
Open the mobile navigation menu
Click the Portfolio section link
Open the mobile navigation menu
Click the Contact section link
Verify the page scrolls to the selected sections on mobile
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Return to the top using the logo
description: This verifies that clicking the site logo returns a visitor to the top of the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to a lower section of the page
Click the site logo in the header
Verify the hero section is displayed

title: Open an external project link from the portfolio gallery
description: A visitor can open a project link from the portfolio gallery in a new tab to view the external project.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the portfolio link in the header
Expand a portfolio category
Open an external project link
Verify the external project link is available
Verify the portfolio category remains expanded

title: Open an external portfolio project in a new tab
description: This verifies that visitors can launch an external project link from the portfolio gallery when a project includes one.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the header link to the Portfolio section
Open a portfolio item that has an external project link
Verify the external project is opened in a new tab
Verify the portfolio page remains available in the current tab

title: Open a social profile from the contact section
description: This verifies that visitors can reach a social profile from the contact section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Contact link in the header navigation
Click a social profile link
Verify the social profile destination is opened

title: Reveal the credibility sections by scrolling through the page
description: This verifies that visitors can scroll through the site and see the About, Skills, Experience, Certifications, Partners, and ticker content reveal correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the About section
Scroll to the Skills section
Scroll to the Experience section
Scroll to the Certifications section
Scroll to the Partners section
Verify the credibility sections are displayed
Verify the client ticker is visible

title: Jump to Partners from the desktop navigation
description: This verifies that desktop navigation links let a visitor jump directly to the Partners section.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the Partners link in the header navigation
Verify the Partners section is displayed

title: Reach the partners section while scrolling the page
description: A visitor can scroll through the page and see the partners section reveal with its credibility content.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the partners section
Verify the partners section is visible
Verify partner brand content is displayed

title: Scroll through the About section reveal
description: A visitor can scroll to the About section and see the biography content reveal as expected.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the About section
Verify the About content is displayed
Verify the section reveal animation completes

title: Scroll through the Skills section reveal
description: A visitor can scroll to the Skills section and see the competency content reveal as expected.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the Skills section
Verify the Skills content is displayed
Verify the section reveal animation completes

title: Open and close the mobile navigation menu
description: This verifies that mobile visitors can open the hamburger menu and close it again without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Open the mobile navigation menu
Close the mobile navigation menu
Verify the page remains on the landing view

title: View the partner and client logo ticker
description: A visitor can see the logo marquee moving continuously as social proof on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the logo ticker
Verify partner or client logos are displayed
Verify the logos move continuously

title: See the desktop-only cursor and animated background
description: This verifies that desktop visitors get the intended visual polish while browsing the portfolio site.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Verify the custom cursor is displayed on desktop
Verify the animated background is displayed on desktop

title: View the footer at the end of the page
description: A visitor can scroll to the bottom of the portfolio and see the footer information and links.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify the footer is visible
Verify footer navigation or informational links are displayed

title: See the custom cursor on desktop
description: This verifies that a desktop visitor can see the decorative custom cursor follow pointer movement on the site.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Move the pointer around the page
Verify the custom cursor is visible
Verify the decorative background is visible

title: Animate the site background while browsing
description: This verifies that the global animated background remains present as the visitor explores the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll the page
Move the pointer around the page
Verify the animated background is visible
Verify the background remains present while scrolling

title: Keep the custom cursor out of the mobile experience
description: This verifies that the desktop-only cursor enhancement does not appear for a mobile visitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Resize the viewport to a mobile size
Scroll the page
Verify the custom cursor is not visible
Verify the site content remains visible

title: Show the custom cursor after interacting with the page
description: This verifies that moving the pointer after loading the site reveals the custom cursor behavior on desktop.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Wait for the page to finish loading
Move the pointer across the main content area
Verify the custom cursor follows pointer movement
Verify the site background remains visible

title: Load the site from the root path
description: This verifies that a returning visitor reaching the root path is taken into the default localized experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the English localized experience is displayed
Verify the hero section is visible
